api_access.conditions: Subject to API Terms (Section 12 of ToU). Must comply with applicable rate limits and usage policies. Attribution and licensing requirements apply.

scrape_data.conditions: Automated access that disrupts services is prohibited. Bot access may be permitted under specific bot policies and community guidelines. High-volume automated access should use the API or data dumps rather than scraping.

post_content.conditions: Contributions must be licensed under a free and open license (e.g., CC BY-SA) or dedicated to the public domain. Users must not post illegal content, violate copyright, or harass others. Contributions are publicly and permanently available.

allow_training.conditions: The Privacy Policy states user information will never be sold or shared with third parties for marketing purposes, and sharing is limited to specific circumstances. No explicit permission for AI/ML training on user data is granted.

create_account.conditions: Account creation is permitted. Email address and real name are not required. Users must adhere to Terms of Use, Universal Code of Conduct, and applicable community policies.
